name: Easy Chicken Ravioli
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Ground raw chicken or turkey
1 8-oz container soft-style cream cheese with chives and onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together chicken or turkey, cream cheese, and shredded carrot in a medium mixing bowl; set aside.
2. Place about 1 tablespoon of filling in the center of each wrapper. Brush edges with water. Fold one corner over to the opposite corner, forming a triangle. To seal, press edges together or use a pastry wheel.
3. Bring a large amount of water and cooking oil to boiling in a Dutch oven. Drop ravioli into the water.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 3 to 4 minutes or until no pink remains in the chicken or turkey.
5. Remove ravioli with a slotted spoon. Drain on paper towels.
6. Divide ravioli among 4 serving plates. Ladle warm sauce over ravioli.
7. To freeze, place uncooked ravioli in a freezer container; seal, label, and freeze for up to 3 months.
8. To cook frozen ravioli, drop into boiling water as directed above, cooking for 5-6 minutes.
